prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华中科技大学在广东物理类最低位次分别为约4967名→4243名→2696名→11351名→3099名，走势波动较大。2023年位次大幅前移至2696名后，2024年因 选科要求调整（全部要求物理+化学）及专业组拆分，位次骤降至11351名；2025年迅速回升至3099名，回归正常水平。近两年波动幅度约8000名，反映该校在广东物理类考生中的 竞争格局趋于稳定但仍有弹性；2021–2025年物理类计划数分别为172人→162人→159人→168人→177人，整体呈小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划160人，较202 5年减少17人（约-9.6%），属明显缩招。缩招将减少供给，理论上使录取位次前移（竞争加剧程度降低），但需结合考生规模变化综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为98 5工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2024年均为第8名，2025–2026年位列第9名，稳居全国前十，属顶尖综合性大学，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏正面：新闻传播学科排名全国前列，食堂数量和质量获全国高校第一评价，招生透明度高；抖音热度排名第22（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考 关注度升温。历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号，声誉整体稳健偏积极；拥有A+学科3个（机械工程、光学工程、电气工程），A学科4个（动力工程及 工程热物理、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、管理科学与工程、物理学），A-学科8个（临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、化学、基础医学、工商管理、 新闻传播学、生物医学工程、生物学），A-及以上共17个学科，学科实力雄厚，工科与医学并重。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等华科优势工科 专业持续高热推荐；临床医学推荐偏热；新闻传播明显劝退。广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争基数扩大。；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区；广东考生对省外顶尖985高校报考意愿较强，该校在广东物理类招生规模较大（160–177人），属外省985在 粤招生大户，地域偏好无明显不利影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3099名、2026年缩招约9.6%（推动位次前移）、广东物理类考生增加约3.6%（推动位次后移）、声 誉偏正面及抖音较热（小幅推高竞争热度）等多因素，考虑考生规模扩大和声誉升温的抵消作用，小幅修正后预测2026年最低位次约2890名，较20 25年前移约209名。区间2543–3237名，半宽约12%。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Guangdong's Physics Category were approximately 4967 → 4243 → 2696 → 11351 → 3099, showing significant fluctuations. After a sharp rise to 2696 in 2023, the ranking plummeted to 11351 in 2024 due to adjustments in subject requirements (all requiring Physics + Chemistry) and major group splits; it quickly rebounded to 3099 in 2025, returning to normal levels. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 8000 places, reflecting that the competitive landscape for this university among Guangdong Physics Category candidates is stabilizing but still elastic; from 2021 to 2025, the number of planned enrollments in the Physics Category was 172 → 162 → 159 → 168 → 177, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 160 students, a decrease of 17 from 2025 (about -9.6%), which is a significant contraction. The contraction will reduce supply, theoretically moving the admission ranking forward (reducing competition intensity), but this needs to be judged in combination with changes in the number of candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2024 were all 8th, and in 2025-2026 it ranks 9th, firmly among the top ten nationally, making it a top comprehensive university with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive: its Journalism and Communication discipline ranks among the top in the country, the number and quality of its canteens are rated first among national universities, and its enrollment transparency is high; its Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting rising attention for applications. There are no obvious signs of significant ranking drops in historical admission anomaly records, and the overall reputation is stable and slightly positive; it has 3 A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering, Physics), and 8 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Biomedical Engineering, Biology), totaling 17 disciplines at A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, emphasizing both engineering and medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at HUST continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine is recommended as relatively hot; Journalism and Communication is clearly advised against. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region; Guangdong candidates have a strong willingness to apply to top 985 universities outside the province, and this university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Guangdong's Physics Category (160-177 students), making it a major enrollment university among 985 universities outside the province in Guangdong, with no obvious adverse effects from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3099, the 2026 enrollment contraction of about 9.6% (pushing the ranking forward), the increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates by about 3.6% (pushing the ranking backward), a slightly positive reputation and relatively hot Douyin presence (slightly increasing competition heat), and taking into account the offsetting effects of the expansion in candidate numbers and rising reputation, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 2890, moving forward by about 209 places compared to 2025. The range is 2543-3237, with a half-width of about 12%.

It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Optoelectronics, Integrated Circuits, Electrical Engineering, etc., HUST's flagship engineering majors) as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Turing Class, Qiming Experimental Class) as a sprint; candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (within 2543) can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (around 3237) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing A-level majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, and Mathematics.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华中科技大学在广东历史类最低位次分别为约1548名→1678名→1978名→2005名→1716名，整体呈先降后升的U型走势。2021–2024年位次从1548名逐步后 移至2005名，累计后移约457名；2025年明显回升至1716名，较2024年前移约289名。近5年波动幅度约457名，整体在1500–2000名区间内波动；2021–2025年历史 类计划数分别为24人→27人→32人→25人→10人，2025年大幅缩减至10人。2026年计划10人，与2025年持平。计划人数在2025年骤降后保持稳定，供给端无额外变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉偏正面，食堂 排名全国第一、新闻传播学科排名前列等正面信号有助于提升报考热度；抖音热度排名第22（较热），整体关注度较高。未见投档异常记录；新闻传播学A-、工 商管理A-、公共管理（相关）等学科与历史类招生专业高度关联，学科实力为报考提供支撑；985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名全国第9名，属顶尖综合性大学，对历史类高分考生同样具有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学类社会热度明显劝退（受张雪峰言论等影响）， 但华科新闻传播学为A-学科，名校光环可部分对冲负面舆情；工商管理类分化观望。广东省2026年历史类考生约326200人，较2025年292200人增加约11.6%，增幅显著，竞争基数 大幅扩大。；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，广东历史类考生对省外985高校报考意愿较强；该校在粤历史类招生计划仅10人 ，属小规模招生，稀缺性可能推高竞争热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1716名、2026年招生计划持平、广东历史类考生大增约11.6%（显著推高位次后移）、声誉偏 正面（小幅推高竞争热度）、新闻传播专业热度偏冷但名校效应部分抵消等因素，考虑考生规模大幅扩大和声誉升温的叠加作用，修正后预测2026 年最低位次约1756名，较2025年后移约40名。区间1545–1967名，半宽约12%。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Guangdong's History Category were approximately 1548 → 1678 → 1978 → 2005 → 1716, showing an overall U-shaped trend of first declining and then rising. From 2021 to 2024, rankings gradually moved back from 1548 to 2005, a cumulative backward shift of about 457 places; in 2025, they significantly rebounded to 1716, a forward shift of about 289 places compared to 2024. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 457 places, with overall fluctuations within the 1500–2000 range; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 24 → 27 → 32 → 25 → 10, with a sharp reduction to 10 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 10, unchanged from 2025. After the sudden drop in 2025, the planned number remains stable, with no additional changes on the supply side.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation is slightly positive; positive signals such as ranking first nationally in cafeteria quality and top rankings in journalism and communication disciplines help boost application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking is 22nd (relatively hot), with overall high attention. No abnormal admission records have been seen; disciplines such as Journalism and Communication (A-), Business Administration (A-), and Public Administration (related) are highly correlated with History Category enrollment majors, providing support for applications; it is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranks 9th nationally in the Soft Science ranking, belonging to a top comprehensive university, which also strongly attracts high-scoring History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (affected by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks, etc.), but HUST's Journalism and Communication is an A- discipline, and the prestigious school aura can partially offset negative public opinion; Business Administration is in a wait-and-see state of differentiation. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, with a significant increase in the competition base. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and Guangdong History Category candidates have a strong willingness to apply to 985 universities outside the province; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong is only 10, a small-scale enrollment, and scarcity may push up competition enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1716, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a significant increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category candidates (significantly pushing rankings backward), a slightly positive reputation (slightly increasing competition enthusiasm), and the cold popularity of Journalism and Communication majors partially offset by the prestigious school effect, considering the superimposed effects of a substantial increase in candidate numbers and rising reputation, the corrected prediction for the 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 1756, about 40 places backward compared to 2025. The range is 1545–1967, with a half-width of about 12%.

It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 (Foreign Languages and Literature, Journalism and Communication) as the main choice, with Tier 1 (Economics, Business Administration) as a reach; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1545) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 1967) should use Tier 3 majors as safety. Note that although Journalism and Communication has an A- discipline evaluation, its social popularity is clearly discouraged, so personal interest should be weighed.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校。其同济医学院是国内顶尖医学院之一，临床医学学科实力雄厚，在华 南地区享有极高声誉，对广东考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学（八年制、卓越医师班等）竞争尤为激烈。2025年华科医学类在广东大幅扩招后，更多中高分段考生得以进入，预计2026年报考 热度不减。学校位于武汉，交通便利，对广东考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量，2026年华中科技大学医学类在广东省最低录取位次预计为16770名，较2025年（14202名）有所回升（更难进），波动区间为16270至17270名。扩招幅度收窄是位次回 升的主因，同时医学报考热度持续高位运行。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Guangdong Province over the past five years are: 2021: 2585th (planned 9 students), 2022: 1906th (planned 9 students), 2023: 3629th (planned 13 students), 2024: 3014th (planned 8 students), 2025: 14202nd (planned 25 students). The significant drop in ranking in 2025 is mainly due to the expansion of the medical enrollment plan from 8 to 25 students (an increase of 212.5%), and the addition of majors such as Preventive Medicine and Public Administration (Health Management), which lowered the overall threshold. In 2026, the plan further expands to 34 students (an increase of 36%), with a notably narrower expansion rate, weakening the downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with strong clinical medicine disciplines, enjoying a very high reputation in the South China region, and has a sustained appeal to Guangdong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, with clinical medicine (eight-year program, outstanding physician class, etc.) being particularly competitive. After the significant expansion of HUST's medical category in Guangdong in 2025, more middle-to-high scoring candidates were able to enter, and it is expected that the popularity of applications will remain high in 2026. The university is located in Wuhan, with convenient transportation, and has a strong appeal to Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors, the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Guangdong Province in 2026 is expected to be 16770th, an increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (14202nd), with a fluctuation range of 16270 to 17270. The narrowing of the enrollment expansion is the main reason for the ranking increase, while the popularity of medical applications remains high.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
